_comment: OPT-IN backfill for Food Log v2, covering the gap from May 20 through June 17, 2026 that opened when the dedicated tracking app went dark on May 21. Paste into the System tab → 'MERGE FOOD LOG' box. Non-destructive per-date merge — will NOT overwrite any day that already has real logged data. Source: Brain Dump reconstructions cross-referenced against Kaizen Reduction summaries (no raw itemized receipts existed for most of these days, so meals=[] and a day-level `nutrients` override carries the estimate). INTENTIONALLY EXCLUDED, no entry below: May 20 (last day before the app went dark — assumed already live-tracked, not reconstructed), May 21/23/25/27 (Brain Dump explicitly states no usable food data exists for these — 'dark days'), May 22 (never appears in any reconstruction pass — no data found at all), June 3 (Brain Dump explicitly calls this a data gap — 'macros untracked'), June 16/17 (no Brain Dump or Kaizen entries found covering these dates as of this backfill). PARTIAL-DATA DAYS (included, but `protein_g` deliberately omitted because no full-day total exists in the source, only micronutrients or a partial-meal subset): June 2 (labeled 'Partial Data Day', only a thin yogurt+cocoa profile was logged), June 8 (the only itemized log found was a ~550kcal breakfast subset — the full-day micronutrient total folds in additional pizza/peanut butter/granola that were never itemized), June 9–13 (full micronutrient tables exist but no macro/protein total was ever recorded for these 5 days in the source material). May 24/26/28 protein figures are the midpoint of a source-given range (e.g. May 26 source says '35-50g'). June 15 uses the 'Complete Final Log' deep-dive table as authoritative wherever it overlaps with an earlier same-day pass (sodium/calcium/iron/potassium/magnesium/vitaminA/vitaminC/vitaminD/folate); zinc_mg and omega3_g are carried over from the earlier pass since the deep-dive table didn't cover them. Sodium/calcium/iron/etc. were omitted entirely on several days (e.g. May 29, 31, June 1, 4-7) where the Brain Dump only gave a qualitative descriptor ('High', 'Excellent') with no actual number — no value invented for those fields, consistent with the existing Apr 10/12 backfill's approach.

2026-05-24.label: May 24 — reconstructed micros (Brain Dump estimate, not itemized) 🧬

health.notes: Significantly under-fueled active-recovery day, ~500-600 kcal logged: 1 leftover slice Costco pizza, 1 tbsp powdered parmesan, 1 oat chocolate-chip cookie. Missed the morning Greek yogurt anchor — protein crashed to single digits.

2026-05-26.label: May 26 — reconstructed micros (Brain Dump estimate, not itemized) 🧬

health.notes: Low-protein, snack-heavy day (~1,600-1,800 kcal, ~35-50g protein) — missed the yogurt anchor again. Croissant bit, snack/protein bar, Sour Patch Kids, burger patties (likely Impossible), cheese, condiments, salad.

2026-05-28.label: May 28 — reconstructed micros (Brain Dump estimate, not itemized) 🧬

health.notes: Fully-logged but light 'Ice Cream Thursday' day, ~1,535 kcal: homemade PB/whey bar, large Costco pizza slice, 5 parmesan packets, 3 scoops UAF ice cream, black tea.

2026-05-29.label: May 29 — reconstructed micros (Brain Dump estimate, not itemized) 🧬

health.notes: ~2,850 kcal, ~120g+ protein, ~170g fat. Morning loaded sandwich (Impossible patty, sourdough, ~4 thick Beecher's/cheddar slices, kale/tomato/mayo). Evening pizza flight + side salad. Sodium/calcium/iron were only described qualitatively (High/Excellent/Solid) in the source — no number given, so omitted here.

health.notes: ~1,655 kcal, ~52.5g protein. Bean-&-cheese slice, regular pizza slice, Costco shredded cheese, sour cream, salsa, tomatoes, kettle chips + French-onion dip, veggie bun, chocolate cupcake.

health.notes: ~2,238 kcal, ~89g protein. Post-therapy pizza slice, Moody's BBQ (Impossible patties), brownie, ice cream, oat cookie. No sodium/calcium/iron figures given in the source for this day.

health.notes: ~2,030 kcal, ~87.5g protein, ~74.5g fat, ~213g carbs. Kirkland Greek yogurt, veg pizza squares, El Dorado potato tacos x2, rice & refried beans, grapefruit Paloma, chocolate sea-salt caramel.

health.notes: Thin, low-protein day well below target — no macro total exists in the source. Kirkland Greek yogurt, tea, unspecified breakfast, strained cocoa, unspecified late dinner.

Costco deli pizza slice, spaghetti + Impossible meatballs, sourdough, butter/garlic spread, parmesan, peanut butter, oat chocolate-chip cookie.

2026-06-15.label: Jun 15 — reconstructed from itemized 'Complete Final Log' (Brain Dump estimate) 🧬

health.notes: ~2,238 kcal, ~94.3g protein, ~101.5g fat, ~237.6g carbs, ~22.6g fiber. Sourdough/cheese pizza bread, Orgain protein shake w/ banana + berries + oat milk, an entire 180g packet of Adukale Kayi Kodubale (~966 kcal alone), Field Roast sausage, Bitchin' sauce, oat cookie, peanut butter. This day had two micronutrient passes — values below prefer the later 'Complete Final Log' deep-dive numbers where they overlap (sodium/calcium/iron/potassium/magnesium/vitamin A/C/D/folate); zinc_mg and omega3_g are carried over from the earlier pass since the deep-dive table didn't cover them.
